markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss improvements and new features for GrowthX's AI-powered content generation process for Strapi.](https://fathom.video/share/xvZSZXmKmeqX7ZYqyqEGQcHx1X22vysx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX will implement blacklisting for specific URLs to exclude certain content from research and internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/xvZSZXmKmeqX7ZYqyqEGQcHx1X22vysx?tab=summary&timestamp=991.0)
  - [The research process will be updated to allow input of specific resource URLs for each article](https://fathom.video/share/xvZSZXmKmeqX7ZYqyqEGQcHx1X22vysx?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
  - [Integration with Kappa AI for fact-checking is planned to improve content accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/xvZSZXmKmeqX7ZYqyqEGQcHx1X22vysx?tab=summary&timestamp=1615.0)
  - [Image generation capabilities will be explored, with Strapi providing style guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/xvZSZXmKmeqX7ZYqyqEGQcHx1X22vysx?tab=summary&timestamp=2396.0)
  - [Future plans include developing a localization workflow and ingesting video content as knowledge sources](https://fathom.video/share/xvZSZXmKmeqX7ZYqyqEGQcHx1X22vysx?tab=summary&timestamp=3360.0)

## Topics

### Current Content Generation Process

  - [Uses AirOps for workflow management and custom APIs for content generation](https://fathom.video/share/xvZSZXmKmeqX7ZYqyqEGQcHx1X22vysx?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
  - [Process includes: assignment brief creation, keyword analysis, research, outline generation, draft writing, and post-processing](https://fathom.video/share/xvZSZXmKmeqX7ZYqyqEGQcHx1X22vysx?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [Recently switched from OpenAI to Claude 3.7 for improved writing quality](https://fathom.video/share/xvZSZXmKmeqX7ZYqyqEGQcHx1X22vysx?tab=summary&timestamp=1504.0)
  - [Fact-checking currently uses AirOps agents, but integration with Kappa AI is planned](https://fathom.video/share/xvZSZXmKmeqX7ZYqyqEGQcHx1X22vysx?tab=summary&timestamp=1613.0)

### Improvements to Research and Sources

  - [Will implement URL blacklisting to exclude specific content (e.g., older Strapi articles, GrowthX-generated content)](https://fathom.video/share/xvZSZXmKmeqX7ZYqyqEGQcHx1X22vysx?tab=summary&timestamp=991.0)
  - [Updating researcher to accept specific resource URLs for each article](https://fathom.video/share/xvZSZXmKmeqX7ZYqyqEGQcHx1X22vysx?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
  - [Exploring integration of video transcripts and podcasts as knowledge sources](https://fathom.video/share/xvZSZXmKmeqX7ZYqyqEGQcHx1X22vysx?tab=summary&timestamp=3360.0)
  - [Planning to develop an internal/external knowledge base system for more efficient research](https://fathom.video/share/xvZSZXmKmeqX7ZYqyqEGQcHx1X22vysx?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

### Content Customization and Context

  - [Added field for user context to provide more specific audience information for each article](https://fathom.video/share/xvZSZXmKmeqX7ZYqyqEGQcHx1X22vysx?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [Strapi team can add additional context and resource links in Airtable to guide content creation](https://fathom.video/share/xvZSZXmKmeqX7ZYqyqEGQcHx1X22vysx?tab=summary&timestamp=2197.0)
  - [GrowthX is developing an internal platform to replace AirTable and AirOps for better workflow visibility](https://fathom.video/share/xvZSZXmKmeqX7ZYqyqEGQcHx1X22vysx?tab=summary&timestamp=2987.0)

### Image Generation

  - [GrowthX uses Recraft AI for image generation with customizable styles](https://fathom.video/share/xvZSZXmKmeqX7ZYqyqEGQcHx1X22vysx?tab=summary&timestamp=2396.0)
  - [Strapi to provide style guidelines and example images for developer-friendly illustrations](https://fathom.video/share/xvZSZXmKmeqX7ZYqyqEGQcHx1X22vysx?tab=summary&timestamp=2602.0)
  - [Will explore adding image generation to the content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/xvZSZXmKmeqX7ZYqyqEGQcHx1X22vysx?tab=summary&timestamp=2396.0)

### Localization and Translation

  - [GrowthX has experience with Spanish and Portuguese localization](https://fathom.video/share/xvZSZXmKmeqX7ZYqyqEGQcHx1X22vysx?tab=summary&timestamp=3086.0)
  - [Proposed starting with a one-page overview of Strapi in multiple languages as a test](https://fathom.video/share/xvZSZXmKmeqX7ZYqyqEGQcHx1X22vysx?tab=summary&timestamp=3180.0)
  - [Discussing potential for developing a Strapi plugin for AI-powered content internationalization](https://fathom.video/share/xvZSZXmKmeqX7ZYqyqEGQcHx1X22vysx?tab=summary&timestamp=3286.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Implement URL blacklisting for research and internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/xvZSZXmKmeqX7ZYqyqEGQcHx1X22vysx?tab=summary&timestamp=991.0)
  - [Update researcher to accept specific resource URLs](https://fathom.video/share/xvZSZXmKmeqX7ZYqyqEGQcHx1X22vysx?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
  - [Integrate Kappa AI for fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/xvZSZXmKmeqX7ZYqyqEGQcHx1X22vysx?tab=summary&timestamp=1615.0)
  - [Strapi to provide image style guidelines for illustration generation](https://fathom.video/share/xvZSZXmKmeqX7ZYqyqEGQcHx1X22vysx?tab=summary&timestamp=2602.0)
  - [Explore localization workflow, starting with a one-page overview in multiple languages](https://fathom.video/share/xvZSZXmKmeqX7ZYqyqEGQcHx1X22vysx?tab=summary&timestamp=3180.0)
  - [Investigate video/podcast content ingestion as knowledge sources](https://fathom.video/share/xvZSZXmKmeqX7ZYqyqEGQcHx1X22vysx?tab=summary&timestamp=3360.0)
  - [GrowthX to develop internal platform for improved workflow visibility](https://fathom.video/share/xvZSZXmKmeqX7ZYqyqEGQcHx1X22vysx?tab=summary&timestamp=2987.0)
